summary: The documentation build failed because `transformers/modeling_utils.py` contains an unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) at line 1974, causing a `SyntaxError` when the doc builder tries to import the transformers module while processing the llama model documentation.
root_cause: An unresolved git merge conflict marker (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`) was left in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` at line 1974, causing a Python SyntaxError when the file is imported during the documentation build.

evidence.quote:
File "/home/runner/work/transformers/transformers/.venv/lib/python3.10/site-packages/transformers/modeling_utils.py", line 1974
    <<<<<<< sonic-moe
    ^^
SyntaxError: invalid syntax
evidence.reason: A git merge conflict marker `<<<<<<< sonic-moe` was left in modeling_utils.py, making it syntactically invalid Python.

evidence.quote: SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: The SyntaxError propagated up and caused the doc build to fail when processing the llama model documentation page.
The CI job exited with a non-zero exit code, confirming the build failure.

suggested_fix: Resolve the git merge conflict in `transformers/modeling_utils.py` around line 1974 by removing the conflict markers (`<<<<<<< sonic-moe`, `=======`, `>>>>>>>`) and keeping the correct code, then commit the resolved file.
